- Tier: S — three i18n dictionary files modified, two key updates each (social.yt.count and social.ig.count). No component/page/style/config changes.

- Non-load-bearing assumption: user's '14K' / '10K' rendered as literal compact-K notation preserving each locale's existing noun (followers/seguidores/粉丝, subscribers/suscriptores/订阅). Implementer may switch to '14,000+'/'10,000+' format without changing the affected files list.
